LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS BRUCE HOBAN, NORMAN WHEATHLEY, LESLIE JORDAN AND MICHAEL HUDSON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION PRESENTS NO EVIDENCE ON THE ISSUES OF DAMAGES. AS A CONSEQUENCE, PLAINTIFFS FAIL TO MEET THE REQUIREMENTS OF C.C.P. SECTIONS 437C(F)(1) AND 437C(P)(1). DEFENDANT IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
